0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne is configured via environment variables and an optional Hermes ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," file. All settings have sensible defaults — you can start using it with zero configuration."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Environment Variables"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Storage & Memory Weights"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne uses hybrid scoring (vector + FTS5 + importance) for recall. These weights are configurable and auto-normalized per query."}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Vector ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bit"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector BEAM benchmark optimizations (OR semantics, larger scans)"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tiered Degradation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic memories degrade through 3 tiers over time. Tier 1 is full content, Tier 2 is LLM-summarized, Tier 3 is entity-extracted compressed signal."}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b"],["$L2c"],"$L2d"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"rL0kYsxstwPZl4oDnLrmK"}

4:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Veracity Weights"}]
5:["$","p",null,{"children":"Memories carry veracity labels that affect their recall weight. These multipliers tune how strongly each veracity level influences retrieval."}]
6:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for explicitly stated facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.7"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for inferred facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for tool-generated output"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.6"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for imported facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for uncategorized/legacy facts"}]]}]]}]]}]
7:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Embeddings"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions, local ONNX) for embedding generation. No external API key is needed for local mode."]}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":["To use a custom embedding endpoint (OpenAI-compatible), set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY"}],". These fall back to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_API_KEY"}]," for backward compatibility."]}]

d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_ENHANCED_RECALL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"unset"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"1"}]," to enable enhanced recall with polyphonic fusion, cross-tier dedup, and graph-based bonus scoring"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_POLYPHONIC_RECALL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"unset"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"1"}]," to enable multi-voice retrieval (voice, graph, fact, temporal parallel scoring)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_PROACTIVE_LINKING"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"unset"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"1"}]," to enable zero-LLM graph edge creation at ingest time"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LENIENT_FACT_MATCH"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"unset"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"1"}]," to revert to permissive fact matching (default is strict)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_BEAM_MODE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"unset"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable BEAM benchmark optimization mode"}]]}]]}]]}]
e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Local LLM (Sleep Summarization)"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep/consolidation cycle can use a local or remote LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory."}]

11:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Host LLM Backend (Hermes Integration)"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"When running inside Hermes, the host agent can provide an LLM backend for consolidation — avoiding duplicate API calls."}]

14:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Multi-Agent Identity"}]

20:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"YAML Configuration"}]
21:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne integrates with the Hermes ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," file (not a standalone ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.yaml"}],"). Configure settings under the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memory.mnemosyne"}]," key:"]}]
22:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"# config.yaml (Hermes project root)\nmemory:\n  mnemosyne:\n    # Auto-sleep consolidation\n    auto_sleep: false             # Auto-run sleep() when working memory exceeds threshold\n    sleep_threshold: 50           # Working memory count before auto-sleep triggers\n\n    # Vector configuration\n    vector_type: int8             # Quantization: float32, int8, or bit\n\n    # Multi-tenant & identity\n    profile_isolation: false      # Separate SQLite DB per Hermes profile\n    shared_surface_read: false    # Merge shared-surface results into recall\n\n    # Pattern filtering\n    ignore_patterns:              # Content patterns to skip during remember()\n      - \"be ACTIVE\"               # Skill refinement boilerplate\n      - \"nothing to change\"       # No-op responses\n      - \"skill.*refined\"          # Wildcard match\n"}]}]
23:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2e",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Auto-generated from code"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["This table is generated from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MnemosyneMemoryProvider.get_config_schema()"}],".\nIf the provider adds or changes config keys, this updates automatically."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
24:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Key"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"auto_sleep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-run sleep() when working memory exceeds threshold. Set true to enable. Backward-compatible with MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep_threshold"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Working memory count before auto-sleep triggers"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"vector_type"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector storage type (note: not yet wired to BeamMemory at runtime; reserved for future use) Choices: float32"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"ignore_patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Regex patterns to filter from memory storage (one per line in config, or comma-separated). Memories matching any pattern are skipped."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable per-profile memory isolation via Mnemosyne banks. Each Hermes profile gets its own SQLite database under mnemosyne/data/banks/<profile>/. Default false for backward compatibility."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"data/shared/mnemosyne.db"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite path for shared surface memories. Default is <mnemosyne>/data/shared/mnemosyne.db."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_read"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When true, mnemosyne_recall merges shared-surface results into private bank recall, tagging each result with its bank ('private' or 'surface'). Default false."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"skip_contexts"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agent contexts where Mnemosyne should skip initialization. Comma-separated list. Defaults to 'cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop'. Set to empty string to enable all contexts. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SKIP_CONTEXTS env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_roles"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"['user', 'assistant']"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation roles to autosave in sync_turn(). List of role names: 'user', 'assistant'. Default ['user', 'assistant'] saves both. Set to ['user'] for user turns only, or [] to disable conversation autosave entirely. Does not affect explicit mnemosyne_remember calls. Identity signal capture is gated by user sync — excluding 'user' also disables identity extraction. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_ROLES env var."}]]}]]}]]}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":"Config file lookup order (first found wins):"}]
26:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"./config.yaml"}]," (current working directory)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/config.yaml"}]," (user-level)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Environment variables (fallback for any setting not in config.yaml)"}],"\n"]}]
27:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Configuration"}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":["No config file is needed. You can create a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance directly in Python:"]}]
29:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(\n    session_id=\"my-agent\",        # Scope working memories to this session\n    db_path=\"./my-memory.db\",     # Custom SQLite database path (optional)\n    bank=\"work\",                  # Named memory bank for isolation\n    author_id=\"alice\",            # Multi-agent identity\n    author_type=\"human\",          # \"human\", \"agent\", or \"system\"\n    channel_id=\"team-slack\",      # Cross-session channel\n)\n"}]}]

2b:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2e",null,{"iconNode":"$23:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Local-first by default"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne requires no external API keys for basic usage. Embeddings use ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384-dimensional, local ONNX runtime). The sleep/consolidation cycle defaults to a local TinyLlama GGUF model. You only need API keys if you configure a remote LLM endpoint via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]," or remote embeddings via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}]

31:null
